title: Lean Pool
description: Lean Pool is a curated archive of Lean 4 formalizations that fall outside Mathlib's scope. It sits between Mathlib's high-bar human review and "anything that compiles": projects are admitted via deterministic linters (no sorry/admit, no extra axioms, no unsafe/partial) and LLM review, and are kept building against the latest Mathlib. The goal is an arXiv-style index of formal-mathematics developments that would otherwise bit-rot in abandoned repositories. Individual pooled projects remain the work of their original authors, recorded in LeanPool/projects.yml, the NOTICE file, and the per-file headers.
